overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt path, passing trees, wooden planks, and a stone marker in a dense woodland environment with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with tree stump and wooden debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, illuminating the forest floor and surrounding tree trunks with a flashlight

entered.detail: large cut tree stump visible at the start of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
tall pine trees lining both sides of the path
tall pine trees lining both sides of the path
low vegetation and bushes along the trail edges
scattered wooden planks or benches on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a tree stump on the left as the camera enters a dark forest trail. The path is narrow and winding, surrounded by dense pine trees and underbrush. Around the 10-second mark, wooden planks become visible on the left side of the trail as the camera continues walking forward through the low-light environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with stone marker

agents.ego_description: continuing through the darker forest interior, approaching and passing a stone pillar on the right side of the path

entered.detail: short stone pillar or marker on the right side of the trail
fallen tree branch lying across the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues deeper into the forest, leaving the wooden planks behind. A fallen branch appears on the left side of the path, and around the 22-second mark, a stone marker becomes visible on the right. The trail remains narrow and dark, with dense trees pressing in on both sides as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey deeper into a dark, claustrophobic forest trail where the narrow path is revealed piece by piece. It begins by passing a tree stump on the left as the camera enters the dense woodland, moving forward through a winding corridor of pine trees and thick underbrush. As the walk progresses, the camera glides past wooden planks lining the left side of the trail before the environment shifts to reveal a fallen branch. The scene then continues its steady forward motion, passing a stone marker on the right as the dense trees press closer from both sides. Finally, the camera pushes further into the low-light wilderness, leaving the markers behind as the trail disappears into the surrounding darkness.
